year.description: Registry year for which to generate the archive book. May be the active year or any previously closed year. No restriction on value.

initiatorEmail.description: Email of the user requesting the archive book. Written to AuditLog.

correlationId.description: Optional correlation ID. Flow generates a GUID if empty.

callerNotes.yearSource: Canvas App should pre-populate the year field from the active year or allow the user to select a year from a dropdown of available years (active + closed).
callerNotes.noYearRestriction: The flow does not validate whether the year is closed or open. Any year value is accepted. This allows generating the archive book at any point — including mid-year.
callerNotes.emptyResult: If no archived documents exist for the requested year, the flow still succeeds and returns an HTML file with a header and an empty-data message row. Canvas App should not treat empty result as an error.
callerNotes.fileAccess: The returned fileUrl gives direct access to the HTML file in the Exports library. Canvas App offers a 'Download' or 'Open in browser' button. The user then uses browser print to produce a PDF.
callerNotes.pdfInstructions: To convert the HTML to PDF: open the file in a browser → Ctrl+P → Save as PDF. The HTML is A4 landscape print-ready per the embedded CSS.

canvasAppCall.note: varSelectedYear is an integer from a year selector control.
